title: I'm Haru, the New Concierge!
overview: For her first day as a concierge at Pokémon Resort, all Haru has to do is enjoy herself on the island as if she were a guest herself!

title: What's on Your Mind, Psyduck?
overview: Psyduck suffers from chronic headaches that erupt into disruptive psychic powers. Can Haru come up with a way to help?

title: I Hope I Can Evolve Too…
overview: When a Magikarp who can't swim well loses his floatie to a passing Wingull, Haru and Psyduck fly after it on a Dragonite to try and get it back.

title: Welcome to the Pokémon Resort!
overview: Haru meets a shy little Pikachu who's trainer really wants him to be more outgoing. But here at Pokémon Resort, everyone is encouraged to be themselves.

title: A Pokémon to Help Me!
overview: A change of plans leaves haru alone and in charge of entertaining new guests Shinx and Luxray. How will she and Psyduck keep things running smoothly?

title: Is That Really the Best Option?
overview: Tyler's uncle Dan brings his beloved Sealeo to the Pokémon Resort, eager to let her stretch her flippers. But when it's time to leave, Dan can't be found.

title: I'm a Role Model Now?
overview: Haru's next task? Showing her new colleague the ropes! But as her little mistakes pile up, she worries if she's the right person for the job.

title: Where I Belong
overview: During a sudden storm, Haru tries to save a trapped Eevee but ends up being rescued by Arcanine — whose trainer is none other than her ex!
